finding_results.notes: Compressed the late food-audit loop and reallocated ending space to an explicit carry-forward boundary: Anika states a no-reset pattern to Ravi and proactively texts Zoe at spiral onset per Zoe's request.
Each targeted beat now has non-numeric stress cues and no more than one explicit time calculation, replacing stacked accounting with embodied pressure signals.
Reworked repeated abstract-impact phrasing into distinct on-page mechanisms: breath loss and a physical cold response.

Replaced the repeated 'She could hear' stem at all three cited beats with distinct sensory constructions (breath hitch, intrusive paternal voice, pen-on-pad friction) while preserving scene pressure and voice.

pass_summaries.summary: All packet findings were resolved in chapter 7: structural carry-forward now lands through explicit boundary action, numeric stress-tell overuse was reduced, and formula impact phrasing was replaced with varied embodied consequences.
Addressed the prose tic flagged in CH07-PRO-001 by eliminating repeated stem setup and diversifying auditory delivery without altering chapter continuity, tone, or heading contract.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=4, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
